title: Ausgewählte Themen aus Hegels Grundlinien der Philosophie des Rechts
further_info: Recommended Reading Brooks, Thom and Sebastian Stein (eds.), Hegel’s Political Philosophy: On the Normative Significance of Method and System. Oxford University Press, 2017. Brooks, Thom. Hegel’s Political Philosophy: A Systematic Reading of the Philosophy of Right. Edinburgh University Press, 2013. Brudner, Alan. The Owl and the Rooster: Hegel’s Transformative Political Science. Cambridge University Press, 2017. James, David. Hegel's Elements of the Philosophy of Right. Cambridge University Press, 2017. Knowles, Dudley. Hegel and the Philosophy of Right. Routledge, 2002. Patten, Alan. Hegel’s Idea of Freedom. Oxford University Press, 1999. Pippin, Robert. Hegel’s Practical Philosophy: Rational Agency as Ethical Life. Cambridge University Press, 2008. Rose, David. Hegel's Philosophy of Right: A Reader's Guide. Routledge, 2011. Siep, Ludwig (Hsg.). G. W. F. Hegel: Grundlinien der Philosophie des Rechts. De Gruyter, 2017. Stekeler-Weithofer. Hegels Grundlinien der Philosophie des Rechts. Ein dialogischer Kommentar. Meiner, 2021. Thompson, Michael J. (ed.). Hegel’s Metaphysics and the Philosophy of Politics. Routledge, 2018.
